title: New Linux proxy expert skill is live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get the new /linux-admin:linux-proxy-expert skill for Squid, Tinyproxy, Dante SOCKS, HTTP/HTTPS proxying, package-manager proxy config, systemd/Docker proxy settings, ACLs, auth, TLS CA trust, and IPv4/IPv6 bind troubleshooting.
highlights: New /linux-admin:linux-proxy-expert for Linux proxy server and proxy-client troubleshooting.
Covers Squid, Tinyproxy, Dante SOCKS, HTTP/HTTPS CONNECT, package managers, systemd services, Docker/Podman, ACL/auth, TLS CA trust, firewall/NAT, and IPv4/IPv6 binding.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.28 with 108 expert skills.
